install_script:
set -e
echo 'Running kotlinx.coroutines install script...'

# Remove the checkPropertyAccess method from TestSecurityManager that causes issues
if [ -f kotlinx-coroutines-core/jvm/test/TestSecurityManager.kt ]; then
  sed -i '/override fun checkPropertyAccess/,/^    }/d' kotlinx-coroutines-core/jvm/test/TestSecurityManager.kt
  echo 'Patched TestSecurityManager.kt'
fi

echo 'kotlinx.coroutines install script complete.'
